title: X.Org Server ChangeDrawableAttributes Out-Of-Bounds Read Information Disclosure Vulnerability
description:
This vulnerability allows local attackers to disclose sensitive information on affected installations of X.Org Server. An attacker must first obtain the ability to execute low-privileged code on the target system in order to exploit this vulnerability.
The specific flaw exists within the handling of the numAttribs field. The issue results from the lack of proper validation of user-supplied data, which can result in a read past the end of an allocated data structure. An attacker can leverage this in conjunction with other vulnerabilities to execute arbitrary code in the context of root.
addtionnal_details:
X.Org has issued an update to correct this vulnerability. More details can be found at:
https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/xorg/xserver/-/commit/6d459e4daf715bea8abdafa8fb130be2f8a1d145
timeline:
2026-04-17 - Vulnerability reported to vendor
2026-06-24 - Coordinated public release of advisory
2026-06-24  - Advisory Updated
